query: SELECT id, username, LENGTH(passwordHash) as hashLen, createdAt FROM admin_credentials LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user wPFtpuzcjTMQHQ6.root --database bn23yPpAqDW8FGGWUFqWsM --execute SELECT id, username, LENGTH(passwordHash) as hashLen, createdAt FROM admin_credentials LIMIT 5;
